description_long: This object is a tactical shotgun with a matte black finish, featuring a compact, modern design suitable for urban environments. It has a full stock with a ribbed texture for improved grip and stability, and a prominent magazine extending below the receiver. The upper section includes a mounted sight or optic, enhancing aiming precision. The barrel is relatively short and robust, with a vented or ribbed muzzle device at the front. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, providing protection for the trigger while allowing easy access. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, giving it a durable and functional appearance.
description: A compact, matte black tactical shotgun with a full stock, ribbed barrel, and mounted optic, designed for urban use. Features a prominent magazine and a rounded trigger guard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ribbed muzzle device and the alignment of the barrel, with the optic and stock barely visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full stock, mounted optic, magazine, and the overall length and profile of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the stock end and the symmetry of the receiver, with the barrel and muzzle device extending forward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the full stock, magazine, and optic from the other side.
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, moderately sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves
